property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:/Users/parsh/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.10.v20260205-0638/jre/bin/server;C:/Users/parsh/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.10.v20260205-0638/jre/bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Users\parsh\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\parsh\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\parsh\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;G:\apache-maven-3.9.13-bin\apache-maven-3.9.13\bin;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3.5\bin;;G:\eclipse;;.

testcase.name: Verify user can access dashboard after login
testcase.system-out: @smoke @dashboard Scenario: Verify user can access dashboard after login # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/Dashboard.feature:7 â– Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application â†· Then Dashboard title should be displayed

testcase.name: Verify user can navigate to Admin module
testcase.system-out: @regression @dashboard @navigation Scenario: Verify user can navigate to Admin module # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/Dashboard.feature:12 â– Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application â†· When User navigates to Admin module â†· Then User should be on Admin page

testcase.name: Verify user can navigate to PIM module
testcase.system-out: @regression @dashboard @navigation Scenario: Verify user can navigate to PIM module # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/Dashboard.feature:18 â– Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application â†· When User navigates to PIM module â†· Then User should be on PIM page

testcase.name: Verify user can navigate to Leave module
testcase.system-out: @regression @dashboard @navigation Scenario: Verify user can navigate to Leave module # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/Dashboard.feature:24 â– Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application â†· When User navigates to Leave module â†· Then User should be on Leave page

testcase.name: Verify user can navigate to My Info module
testcase.system-out: @regression @dashboard @navigation Scenario: Verify user can navigate to My Info module # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/Dashboard.feature:30 â– Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application â†· When User navigates to My Info module â†· Then User should be on My Info page

testcase.name: Verify user can logout from the application
testcase.system-out: @smoke @logout Scenario: Verify user can logout from the application # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/Dashboard.feature:36 â– Given User is logged in to OrangeHRM application â†· When User clicks on user dropdown and logout â†· Then User should be logged out and redirected to login page

testcase.name: Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: @smoke @login_positive Scenario: Verify user can login with valid credentials # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:10 â– Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page â†· When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123" â†· And User clicks the login button â†· Then User should be redirected to the dashboard â†· And Dashboard title should be displayed

testcase.name: Verify user can login with different valid credentials
testcase.system-out: @smoke @login_positive Scenario Outline: Verify user can login with different valid credentials # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:24 â– Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page â†· When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123" â†· And User clicks the login button â†· Then User should be redirected to the dashboard

testcase.name: Verify login fails with invalid username
testcase.system-out: @regression @login_negative Scenario: Verify login fails with invalid username # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:27 â– Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page â†· When User enters invalid username "InvalidUser" and password "admin123" â†· And User clicks the login button â†· Then An error message should be displayed â†· And User should remain on the login page

testcase.name: Verify login fails with invalid password
testcase.system-out: @regression @login_negative Scenario: Verify login fails with invalid password # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:34 â– Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page â†· When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "InvalidPassword" â†· And User clicks the login button â†· Then An error message should be displayed â†· And User should remain on the login page

testcase.name: Verify login fails with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: @regression @login_negative Scenario: Verify login fails with invalid credentials # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:41 â– Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page â†· When User enters invalid username "InvalidUser" and password "InvalidPassword" â†· And User clicks the login button â†· Then An error message should be displayed â†· And User should remain on the login page

testcase.name: Verify login page elements are displayed
testcase.system-out: @regression @login_validation Scenario: Verify login page elements are displayed # file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:48 â– Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page â†· Then Login page should display username and password fields
